title: Videos Revision Take one
description:
A modpack that is built to be updated in big updates

Its a all around mod pack meaning there has to be something for you in here
body:
I have had a problem with Creating too many mod packs and never playing on them ever again. But now i have made a mod pack that i really do like.



This mod pack intend of having a lot of slow small updates every update will add a bunch of new mods.

# This is Take   **ONE** <---

Meaning some stuff might not be good

But that does not mean i wont update it if something is wrong i will but it wont add much


<details>
<summary>What's inside?</summary>

## What's inside?

This mod pack in a kitchen sink mod pack meaning there is probably something for you to enjoy

You want Tech? we got that

You want Food? we got that

You want to kidnap villagers and force them to give you useless items? We got that you insane person.


Some mods you might see in this modpack are 

- Combat Roll
- Fabric Seasons
- Fabric Waystones
- Lootr
- Nullscape
- Tech Reborn
- Artifacts

 And thats only a TINY bit of whats in here


</details>


If you have any questions or bugs ask them in the discord

[The Discord Server](https://discord.gg/37f53Xby5z 'join now ')
